ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemons" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "type_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "type_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the secondary type of the Pokémon (can be null) */,
  "total_stats" INTEGER /* Total base stats of the Pokémon */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Base HP (Hit Points) of the Pokémon */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Base Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Base Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "sp_atk" INTEGER /* Base Special Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "sp_def" INTEGER /* Base Special Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Base Speed stat of the Pokémon */,
  "stage" INTEGER /* Evolutionary stage of the Pokémon */,
  "legendary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the Pokémon is legendary */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species or classification of the Pokémon */,
  "ability_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary ability of the Pokémon */,
  "ability_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the secondary ability of the Pokémon (can be null) */,
  "hidden_ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hidden ability of the Pokémon (can be null) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemons_type_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_1_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemons_type_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_2_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "effective_against" TEXT /* JSON array of type IDs that this type is effective against */,
  "weak_against" TEXT /* JSON array of type IDs that this type is weak against */,
  "resistant_to" TEXT /* JSON array of type IDs that this type is resistant to */,
  "immune_to" TEXT /* JSON array of type IDs that this type is immune to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolution_chains" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolutionary chain */,
  "chain_description" TEXT /* Description of the evolutionary chain */,
  "base_form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base form of the Pokémon in the chain */,
  "final_form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the final form of the Pokémon in the chain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolution_chains_final_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("final_form_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolution_chains_base_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_form_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolution_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step in an evolutionary chain */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evolutionary chain */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon at this stage */,
  "stage" INTEGER /* Stage of the Pokémon in the chain */,
  "evolution_method" TEXT /* Method of evolution (e.g., level up, use item) */,
  "evolution_requirement" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the requirements for evolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolution_steps_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_id") REFERENCES evolution_chains ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolution_steps_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "trainer_type" TEXT /* Type of the trainer (e.g., player, NPC) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the trainer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the trainer is from */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Trainer level or experience level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team entry */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon in the team */,
  "team_position" INTEGER /* Position of the Pokémon in the team */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname given to the Pokémon by the trainer */,
  "current_hp" INTEGER /* Current HP of the Pokémon in the team */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status condition of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_teams_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_teams_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date of the battle */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the battle took place */,
  "battle_type" TEXT /* Type of the battle (e.g., trainer battle, gym battle) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the battle in minutes */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Detailed outcome of the battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle participant */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the battle (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "team_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used by the trainer during the battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_participants_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_participants_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES trainer_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_pokemons" (
  "battle_pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon in a battle */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* HP of the Pokémon during the battle */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack stat of the Pokémon during the battle */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense stat of the Pokémon during the battle */,
  "sp_atk" INTEGER /* Special Attack stat of the Pokémon during the battle */,
  "sp_def" INTEGER /* Special Defense stat of the Pokémon during the battle */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed stat of the Pokémon during the battle */,
  "current_hp" INTEGER /* Current HP of the Pokémon during the battle */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status condition of the Pokémon during the battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_pokemons_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_pokemons_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_pokemons_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the location */,
  "terrain" TEXT /* Terrain type of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_pokemons" (
  "location_pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon in a location */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "spawn_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the Pokémon can be found in the location */,
  "min_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level at which the Pokémon can be found */,
  "max_level" INTEGER /* Maximum level at which the Pokémon can be found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_pokemons_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_pokemons_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., medicine, berry, key item) */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the item in the in-game currency */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_items" (
  "trainer_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item possessed by a trainer */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_items_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item effect */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the effect of the item */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power or strength of the effect */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_effects_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, trainer, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)
